arts.ttl: Arsenal's two big concerns over Mikel Merino emerge amid Martin Zubimendi transfer chase
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to add more reinforcement to their midfield with the signing of Martin Zubimendi having already added Mikel Merino to their squad during he summer transfer window

arts.ttl: Martin Zubimendi to Arsenal: Fabrizio Romano reveals state of play
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Arsenal are in advanced talks to sign Martin Zubimendi as he reveals the state of play of the Real Sociedad midfielder’s move to the Emirates. It is claimed that sources close to the negotiation believe that a deal is 'virtually completed.' Naturally, Arsenal want the 25-year-old to join immediately, but Real Sociedad are insisting that he remains with them until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star tipped to leave if Martin Zubimendi joins in 'key' transfer mistake

arts.ttl: Martin Zubimendi reacts to Arsenal transfer rumours
arts.sum: Martin Zubimendi is poised to join Arsenal in a blockbuster deal in the summer from Real Sociedad, with the Spain international star’s transfer “virtually completed” according to reports in England. He has a release clause of €60 million which has reportedly been triggered, although Real Sociedad are hopeful that he will remain in San Sebastian until the summer.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal's new £51m man Martin Zubimendi is a coup for Mikel Arteta - and not just because the 'next Rodri' chose the Gunners over Liverpool, Man City and Real Madrid
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Zubimendi is a down-to-earth character born and bred in the same region as Mikel Arteta, a true son of San Sebastian who reneged on a decision to join Liverpool this summer.
